holder_address.description: Regen network address of the stability tier holder

committed_amount_uregen.description: Committed amount in uregen (minimum 100 REGEN = 100,000,000 uregen)

committed_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when commitment was made

matured_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when commitment matured (null if not yet matured)

exited_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of early exit (null if not exited early)

accrued_rewards_uregen.description: Total rewards accrued so far in uregen

forfeited_rewards_uregen.description: Rewards forfeited due to early exit (50% of accrued) in uregen
